state.next-action: Resolved the composer follow-up defects from the layout-first page model rollout: the floating launcher now binds the current route so canvas chrome appears on pages like `/contact`, selected blocks keep `Find blocks` visible while editing, hero blocks expose drawer block-data fields, app blocks stay replace-only by design, and live hero preset swaps now show on the draft canvas before publish. Resume `18-06` for shared-sections work, with prior notes still available in `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-layout-first-page-model-hero-block.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-instant-quote-app-block.md`, and `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-composer-media-target-model.md`.
